description: A crew is ready to lay out the foundations for a new structure and needs a survey team to stake out the building corners.

nodes.task_description: Create a new survey request in the system.

expected_outcome.value: The supervisor initiates a new request.

nodes.task_description: Specify the coordinates that need to be staked out, referencing the official site plan drawing.

expected_outcome.value: The supervisor provides the required coordinates from the drawing.

nodes.task_description: Submit the request to the project's survey team.

expected_outcome.value: The survey team receives the request and schedules the work.
